subcodes.first_line: O steadfast calligrapher! Every line written upon the page of existence is but a line of error, save that line which speaketh in the name of Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خطاط باثبات هر خطی در صفحه کائنات خط خطاست مگر خطی که ناطق باسم جمال
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation
